components.name: SmallPage
components.purpose: The canonical 420x564px white card container that every Hub/Wallet flow renders inside.
components.cssDeps: nimiq-style .nq-card class + small scoped flex sizing (max-width 52.5rem, height 70.5rem)
components.notes: Pure slot wrapper; pairs with PageHeader/PageBody/PageFooter. Depends on @nimiq/style nq-card for radius/shadow/bg.

components.name: PageHeader
components.purpose: Card header with nq-h1 slot title, optional back arrow and optional step progress indicator bar.
components.cssDeps: nimiq-style .nq-card-header + .nq-h1; scoped CSS uses var(--nimiq-ease); hardcoded indicator colors #e5e5e5/#24bdb6
components.notes: Emits 'back'. Uses I18nMixin ($t) so scaffolding needs the i18n mixin or a $t shim. Slot 'more' for extra content.

components.name: PageBody
components.purpose: Scrollable card body slot wrapper (flex-grow + overflow-y auto).

components.name: PageFooter
components.purpose: Card footer slot wrapper that applies standard margins to contained nq-button.

components.name: Identicon
components.purpose: Renders the Nimiq hexagonal identicon image for a user-friendly address, with hexagon placeholder for invalid/empty addresses.
components.cssDeps: scoped only (.identicon width 10rem); placeholder is inline data-url SVG with #260133->#1F2348 radial gradient
components.notes: Imports @nimiq/iqons and @nimiq/utils ValidationUtils. Webpack-specific: dynamic file-loader import of iqons.min.svg and __webpack_public_path__/NIMIQ_VUE_COMPONENTS_IMAGE_ASSET_PATH asset-path hack — the #1 porting gotcha; standalone scaffold must inline or copy iqons.min.svg.

components.name: AddressDisplay
components.purpose: Displays a Nimiq (9x4 chunks) or Ethereum address in monospace chunks, optionally click-to-copy via Copyable.
components.cssDeps: scoped; Fira Mono font, hardcoded rgba(31,35,72,.5) (nimiq-blue @ 50%)
components.notes: Uses @nimiq/utils ValidationUtils.normalizeAddress. Needs Fira Mono webfont loaded.

components.name: AddressInput
components.purpose: The signature 3x3-block Nimiq address textarea input with live parse/format, ETH address + checksum support, domain support, per-block focus coloring via mix-blend-mode, and shake-on-invalid.
components.cssDeps: scoped with own CSS vars (--block-width/--block-height/--font-size); uses var(--nimiq-blue), var(--nimiq-light-blue), var(--nimiq-ease); Fira Mono; inline SVG mask-image for selection blocks
components.notes: External deps: input-format lib, @nimiq/utils (Clipboard, ValidationUtils), lazy import('js-sha3') for ETH checksum. Listens on document selectionchange. Emits input/address/paste. Pixel-accuracy depends on letter-spacing calc hack for cross-browser mono rendering.

components.name: Amount
components.purpose: Formats a crypto amount given in smallest units (luna/sats) with grouping, min/max decimals, ~approx prefix and ticker span.
components.notes: Uses @nimiq/utils FormattableNumber. Exports amountValidator helper reused by other components. Ticker casing rules for tNIM/mBTC/USDC.e.

components.name: FiatAmount
components.purpose: Locale-aware fiat currency formatter that picks a positioning locale, swaps in optimized currency symbols and grows decimals until relative deviation is acceptable.
components.notes: Uses @nimiq/utils CurrencyInfo + FormattableNumber and navigator.language. Pure logic component — trivially portable.

components.name: AmountInput
components.purpose: Large auto-resizing/auto-shrinking amount input (8rem font) that parses decimal text and emits the value in smallest units (luna).
components.cssDeps: nimiq-style .nq-input class; scoped uses var(--nimiq-blue), var(--nimiq-light-blue), var(--nimiq-ease); hidden width-finder spans technique
components.notes: DOM-measurement based width/font-size fitting (offsetWidth in nextTick). No external libs.

components.name: AmountWithFee
components.purpose: Composite send-amount widget: AmountInput plus fee line, fiat approximation and insufficient-balance validation, v-model of {amount, fee, isValid}.
components.cssDeps: scoped; nq-text-s, nq-red classes; var(--nimiq-red); deep >>> overrides into AmountInput
components.notes: Slot insufficient-balance-error for custom message.

components.name: QrCode
components.purpose: Canvas-rendered QR code with the Nimiq light-blue radial gradient fill by default, rounded modules, and a toDataUrl() export method.
props: fill: string|gradient = nimiq light-blue radial gradient
components.cssDeps: none (no style block); brand look comes from the default gradient #265DD7->#0582CA
components.notes: External dep: qr-creator. Renders nothing until data is set.

components.name: QrScanner
components.purpose: Full camera QR scanner with gold viewfinder overlay, cancel button, and per-browser camera-permission help instructions.
components.cssDeps: nimiq-style nq-blue-bg + nq-button-s inverse; scoped uses var(--nimiq-gold), var(--nimiq-blue); inline data-url SVGs for browser icons
components.notes: External dep: qr-scanner lib + getUserMedia camera API; auto-retries camera every 3s; emits result/cancel/error. Browser detection via @nimiq/utils.

components.name: Tooltip
components.purpose: The core Nimiq tooltip/popover: trigger slot + positioned dark-gradient box with arrow, container-aware clamping, preferred position fallback, normal/inverse themes.
components.cssDeps: scoped; var(--nimiq-blue-bg) box, var(--nimiq-ease); arrow color hardcoded to gradient sample points (#250737/#23123e/#211e45); SVG mask-image arrow
components.notes: ~620 lines, heavy JS positioning (getBoundingClientRect, scroll listener on container). show()/hide()/toggle() public API; emits show/hide/click. Used by Timer, AccountList, AccountSelector, PaymentInfoLine.

components.name: Copyable
components.purpose: Click-to-copy wrapper that copies slot content or a given text and shows an animated 'Copied' bubble above.
components.cssDeps: scoped; var(--nimiq-light-blue), var(--nimiq-light-blue-bg), var(--nimiq-ease); nimiq-blue based layered box-shadow; SVG mask-image arrow with hardcoded #1A6AD2
components.notes: Uses @nimiq/utils Clipboard. Keyboard accessible (space/enter). Emits 'copy'.

components.name: CopyableField
components.purpose: Labeled copy-to-clipboard field for dark backgrounds, supporting keyed multi-values with selector pills and auto font-size shrink-to-fit.
components.cssDeps: nq-label + nq-button-s classes; scoped designed for dark bg (white text, rgba(255,255,255,.1) field); var(--nimiq-light-blue), var(--nimiq-ease)
components.notes: Used in Keyguard-style dark screens; window resize listener for font fitting.

components.name: LabelInput
components.purpose: Auto-width-growing inline text input (for naming accounts/addresses) with UTF-8 byte-length cap and changed-on-blur semantics.
components.notes: Uses @nimiq/utils Utf8Tools for byte counting/truncation. Emits input (live) and changed (on blur/submit).

components.name: SelectBar
components.purpose: Segmented pill radio bar (e.g. fee speed selector) where options at or below the selected index take the selected option's color class.
components.cssDeps: nq-label class + caller-provided nimiq-style color classes (e.g. nq-light-blue-bg); var(--nimiq-highlight-bg)
components.notes: Emits 'changed' with numeric value; mutates/sorts the options prop in created (minor smell).

components.name: SliderToggle
components.purpose: Animated segmented control where a white sliding 'active box' moves under the selected slot (named slots = options), with loading state.
components.cssDeps: scoped; var(--nimiq-highlight-bg), var(--nimiq-ease); nimiq-blue based triple box-shadow on active box
components.notes: Position computed via getBoundingClientRect on resize/value change. Options are defined by named slots, not a prop.

components.name: CloseButton
components.purpose: Standard round close (X) icon button, with .top-right helper class for absolute corner placement.
components.notes: Emits click.

components.name: LongPressButton
components.purpose: Hold-to-confirm nq-button with a growing pill progress indicator rendered via nested mix-blend-mode masks and a 'Keep pressing…' prompt.
components.cssDeps: nimiq-style .nq-button color classes; heavy mix-blend-mode (lighten/difference/screen) trickery; var(--nimiq-ease)
components.notes: Emits 'long-press'. Inverse mode requires same stacking context as colored background. document-level mouseup listener.

components.name: LoadingSpinner
components.purpose: The Nimiq double-hexagon stroke-dash loading animation, colored via currentColor.
components.notes: Self-contained SVG; ideal scaffold candidate.

components.name: CircleSpinner
components.purpose: Small 18px two-arc circular spinner for inline loading states.
components.cssDeps: scoped rotate keyframe; hardcoded stroke colors #0582CA (light-blue) + #1F2348 (blue @ .3)
components.notes: Functional template, zero logic.

components.name: Timer
components.purpose: Circular countdown ring (offer-expiry timer) that grows to show remaining time, turns orange under 25% left, with expiry tooltip and synchronize() API.
components.cssDeps: scoped; var(--nimiq-blue), var(--nimiq-light-blue), var(--nimiq-light-blue-on-dark), var(--nimiq-orange), var(--nimiq-ease)
components.notes: Uses @nimiq/utils Tweenable for JS-driven radius animation; adaptive update interval; emits 'end'.

components.name: BottomOverlay
components.purpose: Fixed bottom-centered snackbar/banner overlay with dark/light/green themes and auto-shown close button when a close listener is bound.
components.notes: Close button appears only if $listeners.close exists; emits 'close'.

components.name: Account
components.purpose: Single account row/column: identicon (or shop image / cashlink icon), label (optionally editable via LabelInput), wallet label and balance.
components.cssDeps: scoped; nq-blue-bg, nq-label classes; Fira Mono for address-as-label; gradient mask-image text fade
components.notes: Building block for AccountList/AccountDetails/PaymentInfoLine. Emits 'changed' on label edit.

components.name: AccountList
components.purpose: Interactive list of Account rows with hover caret, disabled/insufficient-balance states and explanatory tooltips, emitting account-selected.
components.cssDeps: scoped; var(--nimiq-ease), var(--nimiq-green), var(--nimiq-red); nimiq-blue/light-blue rgba hover + focus ring; deep >>> overrides of Account internals
components.notes: Wallet/Hub specific data shape (AccountInfo from AccountSelector).

components.name: AccountSelector
components.purpose: Full Hub-style account picker across multiple wallets with sorting, BTC/USDC pills, disabled-type tooltips and a 'Login to another account' footer.
components.cssDeps: nq-label + nq-button-s; scoped scroll fade mask-image; hardcoded #F7931A (BTC) / #2775CA (USDC) pills
components.notes: Exports AccountInfo/ContractInfo/WalletInfo interfaces used elsewhere. Hub-specific glue; medium reuse only for wallet-like apps.

components.name: AccountRing
components.purpose: Hexagonal flower-of-6 arrangement of identicons representing a multi-address wallet, with staggered pop-in animation.
components.cssDeps: scoped only; CSS-var driven hex geometry math (--hex-size etc.)
components.notes: Nice brand visual; only meaningful with identicons.

components.name: AccountDetails
components.purpose: Full-pane account detail overlay: large column-layout Account with editable label, balance, copyable AddressDisplay and a close button.
components.cssDeps: scoped; heavy deep >>> overrides of Account sizing
components.notes: Emits close/changed; focus() proxy to editable label.

components.name: Wallet
components.purpose: Deprecated Hub wallet list row with AccountRing/Identicon, balance, and a hover dots-menu (export/rename/change-password/logout).
components.cssDeps: nq-blue-bg menu, nq-orange/nq-icon classes; var(--nimiq-red), var(--nimiq-orange)
components.notes: Marked @deprecated in source — skip for scaffolding.

components.name: PaymentInfoLine
components.purpose: Checkout header line showing crypto amount with fiat price-breakdown tooltip (vendor markup, effective rate, bad-rate warning), animated arrow to the merchant Account, and an expiry Timer.
components.cssDeps: scoped; var(--nimiq-light-blue), var(--nimiq-light-blue-on-dark), var(--nimiq-orange), var(--nimiq-green); arrow-shooting keyframes; deep overrides of Account/Timer
components.notes: NETWORK CALLS: polls live exchange rates every 60s via @nimiq/utils getExchangeRates (CoinGecko/CryptoCompare) to flag bad rates. Hub-checkout specific but the strongest 'payment page' reference.

components.name: LanguageSelector
components.purpose: Compact uppercase language code dropdown that opens a dark nimiq-blue gradient list with full keyboard navigation.
components.cssDeps: scoped; var(--nimiq-blue), var(--nimiq-blue-bg), var(--nimiq-ease); nimiq-blue layered box-shadow; CSS-drawn arrow
components.notes: Uses :where()/:has() selectors (modern browsers only). Emits input.

components.name: Carousel
components.purpose: 3D circular carousel that arranges named slots on a rotating ring with tweened rotation, keyboard arrows and selection events.
components.cssDeps: scoped; perspective 1500px + JS-set translate3d/z-index per entry
components.notes: Uses @nimiq/utils Tweenable + requestAnimationFrame loop; document keydown listener. Emits 'select'.

components.name: Icons
components.purpose: Exports ~38 functional Vue icon components (CloseIcon, ArrowLeftIcon, AlertTriangleIcon, QrCodeIcon, etc.) wrapping @nimiq/style SVGs with the nq-icon class.
components.notes: Build-dependent: imports raw .svg files from @nimiq/style/src/icons via vue-svg-loader — a CLI scaffold must inline the SVGs (sources at nimiq-style/src/icons/) or replicate the loader.

designTokens: Tokens live in the sibling vendored nimiq-style package, consumed by vue-components as @nimiq/style. Colors + gradients: nimiq-style/src/theme.css (html-scoped CSS vars: --nimiq-blue #1F2348, --nimiq-light-blue #0582CA, --nimiq-gold #E9B213, --nimiq-green #21BCA5, --nimiq-orange #FC8702, --nimiq-red #D94432 etc., *-darkened hover variants, radial *-bg gradients like --nimiq-blue-bg radial-gradient(100% 100% at bottom right, #260133, var(--nimiq-blue)), on-dark adaptions --nimiq-light-blue-on-dark #0CA6FE, and --nimiq-highlight-bg rgba(31,35,72,.06); plus .nq-* utility color classes). Easing + durations: nimiq-style/src/main.css (--nimiq-ease: cubic-bezier(0.25,0,0,1), --attr-duration .2s, --movement-duration .4s). Typography: nimiq-style/src/typography.css (html font-size: 8px — the whole system uses 1rem=8px!, font stack Muli + system fallbacks, nq-h1/h2/label/text-s scale; addresses use Fira Mono loaded separately). Card radius/shadows: nimiq-style/src/layout.css (.nq-card border-radius 1.25rem, box-shadow 0 .5rem 3.5rem rgba(0,0,0,0.111158); nq-card-header/body/footer). Buttons/inputs: nimiq-style/src/buttons.css (.nq-button, .nq-button-s, color variants) and inputs.css (.nq-input). Icons: nimiq-style/src/icons/*.svg + icons.css. Compiled bundle: nimiq-style/nimiq-style.min.css. Components otherwise use scoped styles referencing these vars, plus recurring hardcoded rgba(31,35,72,x) nimiq-blue derivatives.
stack: Vue 2.6 + TypeScript class components (vue-property-decorator) + @nimiq/style CSS framework; scoped CSS per SFC; deps: @nimiq/utils, @nimiq/iqons, qr-creator, qr-scanner, input-format, js-sha3; built with vue-cli/webpack (vue-svg-loader, file-loader, webpack-i18n-tools gettext i18n via src/i18n/I18nMixin)

components.name: Modal
components.purpose: Base modal shell with backdrop, SmallPage card, secondary overlay panel, swipe-to-close on mobile, Escape handling and router-aware close that unwinds stacked modal routes.
components.cssDeps: scoped SCSS; vars --modal-transition-time, --overlay-transition-time, --nimiq-ease, --text-14; relies on SmallPage card styles from @nimiq/style
components.notes: Tightly coupled to vue-router (forceClose walks route stack) and a custom v-pointerdown directive; exports enableModalTransition/disableNextModalTransition helpers. Extract router logic to reuse.

components.name: StatusScreen
components.purpose: Full-card status overlay cycling loading/success/warning/error states with animated title, rotating status messages, and action buttons.
components.cssDeps: nimiq-style classes nq-blue-bg/nq-green-bg/nq-orange-bg/nq-red-bg/nq-light-blue-bg, nq-h1/h2, nq-button, nq-link; vars --h2-size, --status-font-size
components.notes: Two style blocks (one unscoped for transitions). Pure props-driven — drop-in for any Nimiq flow.

components.name: AmountInput
components.purpose: Auto-resizing crypto amount input that scales font size to fit, enforces max decimals, and converts between display value and smallest unit (luna).
components.cssDeps: nq-input class; vars --nimiq-blue, --nimiq-light-blue, --nimiq-ease; hidden width-finder spans for measurement
components.notes: Self-contained (no stores). Default 'NIM' ticker suffix replaceable via prefix/suffix slots. Emits input in smallest units.

components.name: Amount
components.purpose: Renders a crypto amount in smallest units with per-currency displayed-decimals logic (NIM/BTC/mBTC/USDC/USDT) wrapping the library Amount component.
components.notes: Reads Settings store for BTC unit + privacy blur — small coupling, easy to inline.

components.name: FiatConvertedAmount
components.purpose: Shows the live fiat value of a crypto amount using exchange rates from the Fiat store, rendering a FiatAmount or a placeholder while rates load.
components.notes: Requires the Fiat exchange-rate store (network-fed); inject your own rate source to reuse.

components.name: AmountMenu
components.purpose: Dropdown attached to an amount field offering Set fee, Send all, and display-currency switching across crypto, mBTC and a fiat currency list.
components.cssDeps: scoped SCSS; vars --nimiq-blue-bg gradient, --nimiq-ease, --body-size; inline SVG glyphs
components.notes: Emits fee-selection / send-max / currency events; fully presentational.

components.name: FeeSelector
components.purpose: Three-preset transaction speed/fee picker (6h+, 2-4h, 15m) with an animated SpeedGauge, emitting the chosen fee from a fees array.
components.cssDeps: scoped SCSS; vars --text-40/50/80, --nimiq-highlight-bg, --nimiq-ease; uses global button.reset
components.notes: Maps delay presets to the fees prop; testnet shortcut via useConfig (removable).

components.name: SpeedGauge
components.purpose: Small SVG speedometer whose needle animates to a given speed value, used to visualize fee/confirmation speed.

components.name: AddressList
components.purpose: Scrollable list of the active account's NIM addresses (plus optional BTC/stablecoin rows) with balances, active highlight 'background' pill that animates between rows, and add-address button.
components.cssDeps: scoped SCSS; vars --nimiq-blue, --nimiq-highlight-bg, --bg-card, --text-50/70/80/100; animated --backgroundYOffset/--backgroundYScale custom props
components.notes: Heavily store-coupled (Address/Account/Btc/Polygon/Staking stores) and router-aware; emits address-selected. The sliding highlight technique is the signature visual.

components.name: AddressListItem
components.purpose: Single address row showing Identicon (or BTC/USDC/USDT icon), label, vesting/lock badges, staked badge, Amount and fiat value.

components.name: BalanceDistribution
components.purpose: Animated SVG donut/arc chart of portfolio share across NIM, BTC, USDC and USDT with hoverable per-currency breakdown list and FLIP arc transitions.
dependsOn: stores/Address, BtcAddress, PolygonAddress, Fiat, Staking, AccountSettings
components.notes: All data from stores — to reuse, replace setup() computeds with props. The arc math/transition code is the valuable part.

components.name: TransactionList
components.purpose: Virtual-scrolled, month-grouped NIM transaction history with fuzzy search filtering, skeleton loading, unclaimed-cashlink section and staking reward rows.
components.cssDeps: scoped SCSS; nq-h1, nq-button, nq-text, nq-blue/orange; vars --text-6/60, --label-size
components.notes: External dep: forked vue-virtual-scroller; deep store coupling (Transactions/Address/Network).

components.name: TransactionListItem
components.purpose: One NIM transaction row: peer identicon/label resolution (contacts, cashlinks, swaps, bank), state styling (pending/expired/invalidated), amount and historic fiat value.
components.cssDeps: scoped SCSS; nq-orange/nq-red state colors; vars --nimiq-green, --nimiq-highlight-bg, --fiat-amount-height, currency color vars
components.notes: The peer-resolution logic lives in composables; good reference for any tx row.

components.name: BtcTransactionList + BtcTransactionListItem
components.purpose: Bitcoin variant of the transaction list/row pair with electrum tx states and swap matching.
components.cssDeps: same token set as TransactionList; nq-h1/nq-button/nq-orange
components.notes: Also UsdcTransactionList(Item).vue and UsdtTransactionList(Item).vue at wallet/src/components/ — same pattern per stablecoin; catalog them as variants of this entry.

components.name: ContactBook
components.purpose: Searchable NIM contact manager overlay: list with identicons, inline label editing, delete, and contact selection for sending.
components.notes: Emits contact-selected; UsdcContactBook.vue is the Avatar-based 0x-address sibling (medium reuse).

components.name: ContactShortcuts
components.purpose: Row of recent-contact identicon buttons plus an 'open contact book' button shown at the start of a send flow.
components.notes: UsdcContactShortcuts.vue is the AvatarButton sibling.

components.name: Avatar
components.purpose: Letter-initial avatar with deterministic background color from the label, falling back to a generic silhouette SVG when unlabelled (used for BTC/EVM addresses without identicons).
components.cssDeps: scoped SCSS; background classes from lib/AddressColor (nimiq palette)

components.name: AvatarButton
components.purpose: Clickable Avatar with label underneath, for contact shortcuts.

components.name: IdenticonButton
components.purpose: Clickable Nimiq Identicon with label, for address/contact pickers.

components.name: IdenticonStack
components.purpose: Active address identicon stacked over up-to-two background address identicons (or Bitcoin icon) with dropdown triangle — the address-switcher trigger.
components.notes: Store-driven; convert background/active addresses to props for reuse.

components.name: ShortAddress
components.purpose: Truncated address display: first/last N characters separated by a three-dot SVG ellipsis.

components.name: InteractiveShortAddress
components.purpose: ShortAddress wrapped in a Tooltip revealing the full address, optionally copyable with copied-state feedback.

components.name: ResizingCopyable
components.purpose: Copyable text block that measures its content with a hidden width-finder and scales font-size down so long strings (addresses, IBANs) fit on one line.

components.name: SearchBar
components.purpose: Pill search input with magnifier icon that expands on focus, shows clear (cross) button, and emits v-model input events.
components.cssDeps: scoped SCSS + small unscoped block; vars --nimiq-light-blue, --light-blue-40 focus ring, --text-16/22

components.name: BlueLink
components.purpose: Light-blue inline link with trailing small arrow icon (nq-link styling passthrough).

components.name: CrossCloseButton
components.purpose: Minimal circular X close/dismiss button.

components.name: AttentionDot
components.purpose: Small pulsing green notification dot for badges.

components.name: ButtonGroup
components.purpose: Segmented pill radio-group built from an options record, keyboard accessible, emitting the selected key.

components.name: AnnouncementBox
components.purpose: Dismissible green announcement card with text + CTA link/button, persisted dismissal.
components.notes: Content is hardcoded/config-driven in setup — parametrize to reuse.

components.name: MessageTransition
components.purpose: Wrapper that animates height and cross-fades when its slotted message/content changes (used under inputs for validation messages).

components.name: DoubleInput
components.purpose: Container that animates between a single input and an extended two-input stack (e.g. bank name + IBAN).

components.name: LoadingList
components.purpose: Skeleton placeholder rows (transaction-shaped or validator-shaped) with staggered shimmer animation.

components.name: StepProgressBar
components.purpose: Story-style 3-segment progress bar with timed fill animation and pause support, for multi-step onboarding modals.

components.name: LineChart
components.purpose: Generic smoothed SVG line chart from {x,y} points with bezier smoothing factor and draw-in animation.

components.name: PriceChart
components.purpose: Crypto price history sparkline with percentage change and timespan label per currency, fed by the Fiat store's rate history.
components.notes: Network: price history fetched via store; sits on dark sidebar background.

components.name: CountryFlag
components.purpose: Country flag icon by ISO code rendered from a sprite asset, with 'all countries' fallback.
components.cssDeps: --size var; needs flags sprite from src/assets

components.name: CountrySelector
components.purpose: Searchable country dropdown with flags and localized names (Intl.DisplayNames), click-outside close, optional 'All countries' option.
components.notes: External dep v-click-outside; uses browser Intl.DisplayNames.

components.name: BankCheckInput
components.purpose: Bank-name autocomplete validating SEPA Instant support against the OASIS bank list, with country selection and support-level warnings.
components.notes: Loads bank list remotely; OASIS-specific but the autocomplete pattern is reusable.

components.name: BankIconButton
components.purpose: Bank icon + name pill with dropdown triangle, the trigger for bank selection.

components.name: BtcAddressInput
components.purpose: Validating Bitcoin address input with paste/QR request-link parsing and inline QR-scan button.

components.name: BtcLabelInput
components.purpose: Label input with Avatar preview for naming BTC senders/recipients, backed by the BtcLabels store.

components.name: QrCodeOverlay
components.purpose: Modal overlay rendering a large QR code for an address with short-address caption.

components.name: PaymentLinkOverlay
components.purpose: Payment-request creator: amount input with currency menu generating a nimiq:/bitcoin: payment link as QR + copyable URL.

components.name: ReceiveModal
components.purpose: NIM receive flow modal switching between payment-link creation and plain QR overlays for the active address.
components.notes: BtcReceiveModal.vue and StablecoinReceiveModal.vue are the per-chain siblings (low/medium).

components.name: SendModal
components.purpose: Complete NIM send flow: recipient picking (contacts/addresses/QR), amount entry with fee + send-all, validation, Hub signing and StatusScreen result.
components.cssDeps: broad nimiq-style usage: nq-button, nq-input, nq-label, nq-green-bg/gold-bg, nq-notice
components.notes: Exports RecipientType enum used by ContactBook. Hub API + stores throughout — reference implementation rather than drop-in. BtcSendModal.vue / StablecoinSendModal.vue are siblings.

components.name: SendModalFooter
components.purpose: Send-flow footer with the primary send button, error/warning messaging via MessageTransition, and incomplete-history guard.

components.name: ScanQrModal
components.purpose: Camera QR-code scanner modal that parses scanned payment links/addresses and routes to the right send flow.
components.notes: Browser API: camera/getUserMedia; routing glue on scan result.

components.name: ConsensusIcon
components.purpose: Network consensus indicator switching between syncing/established/warning world icons based on the Network store.

components.name: FlaggedAddressWarning
components.purpose: Orange warning page shown when a recipient address is flagged (scam/sanctions dataset), with details and proceed/abort actions.

components.name: UpdateNotification
components.purpose: Bottom overlay prompting the user to reload when a new service-worker version is available.
components.notes: Tied to service-worker registration events.

components.name: MobileActionBar
components.purpose: Fixed bottom bar on mobile with Receive/Send buttons and QR-scan shortcut for the active currency.

components.name: AccountBalance
components.purpose: Total account fiat balance header with animated count-up and privacy (blur amounts) toggle.
components.notes: Fully store-driven.

components.name: AccountMenu + AccountMenuItem
components.purpose: Sidebar account switcher trigger (identicon + label + menu dots) and the per-account row with type icon and total fiat value used inside the account menu modal.
components.notes: modals/AccountMenuModal.vue is the dropdown/modal listing accounts + settings actions (low, app glue).

components.name: Sidebar
components.purpose: Dark-blue app sidebar: price chart, balance distribution, network/consensus status, trade actions, account menu and settings link.
components.cssDeps: dark theme on --bg-secondary (nimiq-blue); nq-blue, nq-label, custom-scrollbar-inverse mixin
components.notes: Best reference for Nimiq dark-sidebar composition; app glue otherwise.

components.name: StablecoinSelector
components.purpose: USDC/USDT segmented toggle with brand-colored slider.

components.name: KycPrompt
components.purpose: Purple TEN31-Pass KYC upsell box showing raised swap limits, opening the KYC connect overlay.
components.notes: kyc/KycOverlay.vue is the matching connect overlay (PageHeader/Body/Footer; TEN31 Pass popup).

components.name: TextShimmer
components.purpose: Inline shimmering placeholder text effect for loading numeric values.

components.name: AmountSlider
components.purpose: Draggable amount slider with identicon-style knob, live NIM amount editing in a pill, and percentage track fills — used to pick stake size.
components.notes: 719 lines of pointer-event math; store-coupled to available balance but the slider mechanics are generically useful.

components.name: ValidatorIcon
components.purpose: Validator logo image with Identicon fallback for unregistered validators.
components.notes: ValidatorIconStack.vue stacks several with hover spread (medium/simple).

components.name: ValidatorTrustScore + ValidatorReward
components.purpose: Pill badges showing a validator's trust score (color-graded green/orange/red) and estimated annual reward percentage.

components.name: ValidatorListItem
components.purpose: Selectable validator row with icon, label/description tooltip, trust score and reward, used in the validator picker.

components.name: ValidatorScoreDetails
components.purpose: Expandable breakdown of a validator's score components (availability, reliability, dominance) with bars.

components.name: StakingButton
components.purpose: Green staking entry button/pill with tooltip states (disabled reasons), opening the staking modal.

components.name: Staking flow pages (StakingModal, StakingWelcomePage, StakingValidatorPage, StakingGraphPage, StakingInfoPage, StakingRewardsPage, SelectAccountOverlay, ValidatorsListOverlay, ValidatorDetailsOverlay/Modal, ValidatorFilter, StakingGraph, StakingRewardsChart, StakingRewardsListItem, StakingOverview, StakingPreview, AccountStake, WelcomeStakingModal, LabelTooltip, ValidatorDescriptionTooltip, ValidatorInfoBar, ValidatorLabel)
components.purpose: Multi-page staking wizard (welcome, validator pick with filter/sort, amount graph, info/rewards dashboards) plus reward history chart (vue-chartjs) and overview widgets.
props: varies per page; StakingModal: month?: string
components.cssDeps: mix of nq-* classes, --nimiq-green accents, scoped SCSS per file
components.notes: App-specific staking glue; StakingRewardsChart pulls in chart.js/vue-chartjs. Reusable pieces broken out above (AmountSlider, ValidatorIcon, TrustScore, ListItem, ScoreDetails, TextShimmer).

components.name: SwapBalanceBar
components.purpose: Interactive two-asset balance bar with draggable handle to set swap amounts, showing before/after distribution per asset with brand colors.
components.notes: 1088 lines of drag math; unique Nimiq-wallet visual worth scaffolding.

components.name: SwapAnimation
components.purpose: Full-screen animated swap progress scene (coins flying between asset/bank icons) driven by SwapState, with error and success states.
props: swapId, swapState, fromAsset/toAsset, fromAmount/toAmount, fromAddress/toAddress, nimAddress, bankLogo, bankColor, error...
components.cssDeps: nq-blue-bg scene, nq-card-header/footer, many nq-* classes; bundled SVG assets in swap/animation/
components.notes: Fastspot/OASIS swap-specific.

components.name: SwapFeesTooltip
components.purpose: Tooltip itemizing per-network and service fees of a swap in fiat.
props: btcFeeFiat?, oasisFeeFiat?, oasisFeePercentage?, sepaFeeFiat?, nimFeeFiat?, usdcFeeFiat?, usdtFeeFiat?, serviceSwapFeeFiat?, serviceSwapFeePercentage?, currency
components.cssDeps: uses global .tooltip .price-breakdown grid styles from themes.scss

components.name: SwapNotification
components.purpose: Floating bottom notification tracking an in-flight swap across views with progress, expiry countdown and error states.
components.notes: Deep swap-engine coupling; the toast pattern itself is reusable.

components.name: SwapModal + SwapSepaFundingInstructions + OasisLaunchModal
components.purpose: Full Fastspot swap flow (asset pair pick, quote, limits, KYC gates, SEPA funding instructions) — the app's largest component.
components.notes: 3078 lines; network: Fastspot/OASIS APIs.

components.name: TransactionModal family (TransactionModal, BtcTransactionModal, UsdcTransactionModal, UsdtTransactionModal)
components.purpose: Per-currency transaction detail modals: parties with identicon/avatar, amounts, historic fiat, fee, block data, message decoding, swap linkage and explorer links.
components.notes: Good reference for a Nimiq detail-card layout; store coupled.

components.name: AddressSelectorModal
components.purpose: Slim modal wrapping AddressList to pick a sender/recipient address.

components.name: HistoryExportModal
components.purpose: Export transaction history as CSV with format/scope selection via ButtonGroup.

components.name: NetworkMap + NetworkMapPeerList + NetworkStats
components.purpose: Canvas hexagon world map plotting network peers with tooltip peer lists, plus consensus/peer/height stat tiles for the Network view.
components.cssDeps: scoped SCSS; --nimiq-gold-darkened peer dots, dark-bg context
components.notes: Distinctive Nimiq visual; rendering logic in src/lib/NetworkMap.ts.

components.name: TestnetFaucet
components.purpose: Button requesting free testnet NIM from the faucet API for a given address, with loading/error states.
components.notes: Network call to faucet endpoint; handy for any testnet demo app.

components.name: PolygonWarningPage + PolygonWarningFooter
components.purpose: Warning page/footer educating users that stablecoin send/receive must use the Polygon network.

components.name: BtcCopiedAddress
components.purpose: Row for an already-shared BTC receive address with label editing, short address tooltip, and remove action.

components.name: UsdcAddressInfo
components.purpose: Polygon 0x-address display with avatar, optional label editing and copy tooltip, themable dark variant.

components.name: Fiat on/off-ramp modals (BuyCryptoModal, SellCryptoModal, BuyOptionsModal, TradeModal, CoinifyModal, MoonpayModal, SimplexModal, CoinifySellInfoModal, MoonpaySellInfoModal, BuyCryptoBankCheckOverlay, SellCryptoBankCheckOverlay)
components.purpose: Provider-specific buy/sell flows (OASIS SEPA, Coinify, Moonpay, Simplex iframes) plus the provider/country chooser.
components.notes: Third-party iframes + Fastspot/OASIS network calls; app-specific glue.

components.name: Onboarding/notice modals (WelcomeModal, MigrationWelcomeModal, WelcomeStakingModal, BackupModal, BtcActivationModal, PolygonActivationModal, StablecoinSelectionModal, UsdtAddedModal, MultisigAnnouncementModal, LegacyAccountNoticeModal, ReleaseNotesModal, DisclaimerModal, NetworkInfoModal, WalletStatusModal, OasisLaunchModal)
components.purpose: One-off informational and onboarding dialogs (welcome slides with StepProgressBar, backup reminder, currency activation, release notes, disclaimers).
components.notes: Useful as copy/layout references for Nimiq multi-step onboarding cards; logic is app glue.

components.name: App layouts (Groundfloor, AccountOverview, AddressOverview, Network, Settings)
components.purpose: Top-level 3-column wallet shell and its panels: account column (balance, address list, promo boxes), address column (header, action buttons, tx lists), network view and settings page.
components.cssDeps: --bg-base/--bg-primary/--bg-secondary theme vars, breakpoint-heavy SCSS from scss/variables.scss, scroll-mask mixin
components.notes: The canonical wallet.nimiq.com responsive layout — valuable as a structural reference, not as a scaffoldable component.

components.name: Misc small glue (CashlinkButton, LegacyAccountNotice, LegacyAccountUpgradeButton, WalletStatusButton, TransactionListOasisPayoutStatus, TransactionDetailOasisPayoutStatus, UsdcContactBook, UsdcContactShortcuts, AccountStake, _Template)
components.purpose: App-specific helpers: unclaimed-cashlink pill, legacy-account migration notices, wallet status indicator, OASIS payout status chips, USDC contact variants, and the blank SFC template.
components.notes: Catalogued for completeness; skip when scaffolding.

components.name: icons/ directory (~70 SVG icon components)
components.purpose: Single-file SVG icon components: currencies (BitcoinIcon, UsdcIcon, UsdtIcon(Padded)), world/consensus set, staking leaf set (icons/Staking/), account-menu set, swap, bank, flags, arrows, misc decorative icons (HighFive, OverflowingCup).
components.notes: Pure inline SVG, zero logic — trivially portable. AnimatedLeafIcon contains CSS keyframe animation.

designTokens: Two layers. (1) Package @nimiq/style v0.8.2 — imported once in wallet/src/main.ts as '@nimiq/style/nimiq-style.min.css' — supplies the brand foundation: Muli font, --nimiq-blue (#1F2348), --nimiq-light-blue (#0582CA), green/orange/red/gold/purple + their *-bg radial gradients, --nimiq-ease easing, --nimiq-highlight-bg, border radii, and all nq-* utility classes (nq-h1/h2, nq-text, nq-button(-pill/-s), nq-input(-s), nq-card-header/footer, nq-link, nq-notice, color classes). (2) App tokens in wallet/src/scss/: themes.scss (loaded globally via main.ts) defines surface vars --bg-base/--bg-primary/--bg-secondary, the text-opacity scale --text-100..--text-6 (alpha steps of nimiq blue), asset colors --bitcoin-orange #F7931A / --usdc-blue #2775CA / --usdt-green #009393, the full font-size scale (--body-size 2rem, --small-size 1.75rem, --label-size, --small-label-size, --tiny-label-size, --h1-size 3rem, --h2-size 2.5rem, button/link sizes) with mobile overrides at $halfMobileBreakpoint, purple-darkened gradients, and nq-* overrides (tooltip box, price-breakdown grid, nq-label). functions.scss has nimiq-blue($alpha)/nimiq-light-blue($alpha) SCSS helpers; variables.scss holds the responsive breakpoints (mobile 768px, tablet 960px, halfMobile 1160px ... ultraLarge 2000px), mirrored for JS in scss/modules/variables.module.scss + variables.ts; mixins.scss provides custom-scrollbar(-inverse) and scroll-mask gradient mixins. wallet/src/App.vue's unscoped style block defines --transition-time and the global route/modal slide-fade transitions. Root font sizing follows the nimiq-style 8px rem convention (1rem = 8px), so --body-size: 2rem = 16px.
stack: Vue 2.6 + TypeScript + @vue/composition-api, SCSS scoped styles, @nimiq/style 0.8.2 + @nimiq/vue-components (albatross build) + @nimiq/iqons identicons, vue-i18n, vue-router 3, custom composable stores, vue-virtual-scroller (sisou fork), chart.js/vue-chartjs (staking rewards only)

components.name: StatusScreen
components.purpose: Full-card overlay that animates between loading (title + spinner + sliding status text), success, warning, and error states with optional action button and alternative-action link.
props: status?: string (current loading step, cross-fades on change)
components.cssDeps: nimiq-style classes nq-blue-bg/nq-light-blue-bg/nq-green-bg/nq-orange-bg/nq-red-bg, nq-h1/nq-h2/nq-text, nq-button orange|red inverse, nq-link; scoped CSS + one global <style> block (.status-screen .title etc., grow-from-bottom-button keyframes); no CSS vars except own --status-screen-margin/--status-font-size
components.notes: Fully self-contained (no store/RPC). Emits 'main-action'/'alternative-action'. Exposes StatusScreen.State and StatusScreen.SUCCESS_REDIRECT_DELAY=2000ms. Slots: loading/success/warning/error for custom icons. The single best reusable piece in the repo — every hub flow layers it over a SmallPage.

components.name: OnboardingMenu
components.purpose: Three-choice login/signup card (Create Account / Login / Connect Ledger) with a sliding colored background panel that follows hover/focus between the choices.
components.cssDeps: nimiq-style: nq-h2, nq-green-bg/nq-light-blue-bg/nq-blue-bg gradients, var(--nimiq-blue); scoped CSS with cubic-bezier(0.25,0,0,1) easing, sibling-selector hover choreography, 750px column-layout breakpoint; wrapped in SmallPage
components.notes: Pure presentational; emits signup/login/ledger via @Emit. Measures text offsetHeight on mount to toggle 3-line layout (i18n-driven). Class is misnamed 'AccountList' internally. Canonical Nimiq login UI.

components.name: IdenticonSelector
components.purpose: Hexagonal grid of 7 identicons for choosing a new address avatar, with pop-in animation, 'More Avatars' paging, and a blur-backdrop confirm panel containing label input + address display.
components.cssDeps: nimiq-style: nq-h2, nq-button light-blue, nq-button-s; scoped CSS with absolute translate() honeycomb layout, pop-in keyframes, filter:blur(20px) on .blur-target, cubic-bezier(0.25,0,0,1)
components.notes: Emits 'identicon-selected' with the chosen account. AccountInfo coupling is shallow (3 fields) — easy to genericize. Header slot overridable.

components.name: CheckoutManualPaymentDetails
components.purpose: Dark-blue card showing manual payment instructions as copyable label/value fields (address, amount, fee, reference) with PaymentInfoLine header and back arrow.
props: paymentDetails: Array<{label: string, value: string|number|object}> (required, validated)
components.cssDeps: nimiq-style: nq-blue-bg, nq-notice warning, nq-h1; scoped CSS, 375px media query; SmallPage shell
components.notes: Emits 'close'. The PaymentInfoLine + CheckoutServerApi.fetchTime wiring is hub glue; the CopyableField list card itself is broadly reusable. Network call on mount when callbackUrl present.

components.name: CurrencyInfo
components.purpose: Header above a checkout card showing the currency name with its icon (nimiq-logo class for NIM, img src otherwise) and the approximate fiat fee ('No Fee' / '~ 0' / '~ $0.12 Fee').
components.cssDeps: nimiq-style: nq-h1, nq-text, nq-icon nimiq-logo (from nimiq-style.icons.svg); small scoped block
components.notes: Clever isAlmostFree check via toLocaleString digit stripping. Near zero coupling.

components.name: LabelAvatar
components.purpose: Circular avatar that renders the first letter of a label on a deterministic iqons background color, or a placeholder ghost SVG when unlabeled.
components.cssDeps: nimiq-style nq-{color}-bg gradient classes (gold/blue/light-blue/green/light-green/orange/red/purple/brown via mapping); tiny scoped block (5.25rem circle)
components.notes: Maps iqons color names to nimiq-style CSS names (yellow→gold, indigo→blue, blue→light-blue, teal→green, green→light-green). Embedded inline placeholder SVG uses #1F2348 (nimiq blue) at .25 opacity.

components.name: CircleSpinner
components.purpose: Tiny 18px two-arc inline loading spinner (light-blue over faded dark-blue) spun by a CSS keyframe.
components.cssDeps: None external — functional template, scoped keyframes; colors hardcoded as hex #0582CA (nimiq light blue) and #1F2348 at .3 opacity
components.notes: Functional component, zero dependencies. Drop-in for button/inline loading states.

components.name: CheckoutCard (base)
components.purpose: Script-only abstract base class for all checkout payment cards: merchant-server state polling (paid/underpaid/overpaid), offer-expiry timeout with server time offset, currency selection + history-state re-selection, and StatusScreen success/warning orchestration.
dependsOn: hub lib/CheckoutServerApi (fetch to merchant callbackUrl with csrf)
components.notes: Valuable as the reference checkout state machine but inseparable from hub RPC ($rpc.resolve/reject), ParsedCheckoutRequest, and the Nimiq checkout-server protocol (payment_state/payment_accepted JSON). Network calls: getState/fetchPaymentOption polling.

components.name: CheckoutCardNimiq
components.purpose: The native NIM checkout card: PaymentInfoLine header, demo video + Login CTA when no wallets, AccountSelector with live balance check via pico consensus, insufficient-balance 'Get NIM' notice, then handoff to Keyguard or Ledger signing.
components.cssDeps: nimiq-style: nq-h1, nq-text nq-orange, nq-button-pill light-blue, nq-button-s, var(--nimiq-ease), var(--nimiq-gray); SmallPage 52.5rem wide; scoped CSS incl. transition-fade for StatusScreen overlay
dependsOn: @nimiq/vue-components: AccountSelector, PageBody, PageFooter, SmallPage, PaymentInfoLine, StopwatchIcon, TransferIcon, UnderPaymentIcon, QrCodeIcon
components.notes: Visually the canonical Nimiq checkout, but deeply wired to hub: Vuex wallets/getters, IndexedDB WalletStore, sessionStorage balance cache, blockchain consensus listeners, Keyguard SignTransactionRequest construction, vue-router redirects. Extract template+styles only; logic is app glue. References /checkout-demo.mp4 public asset.

components.name: CheckoutCardExternal
components.purpose: Generic external-wallet checkout card: 'Pay with X' confirm step, then QR code (nimiq-blue radial-gradient fill) + payment-URI deep link with wallet-app detection via window blur trick, big crypto Amount, and a 3D card-flip to manual payment details.
components.cssDeps: nimiq-style: nq-h1, nq-notice warning, nq-button light-blue, nq-link, nq-text-s, nq-light-blue, var(--nimiq-ease); relies on global transition-flip/.flip-primary/.flip-secondary classes defined in hub/src/App.vue; heavy scoped CSS with >>> deep selectors into vue-components internals
dependsOn: @nimiq/vue-components: Account, QrCode, Amount, FiatAmount, PaymentInfoLine, SmallPage, PageBody, PageFooter, CaretRightSmallIcon, StopwatchIcon, UnderPaymentIcon
components.notes: paymentLink getter is abstract — must subclass per currency. 10s polling interval against merchant callbackUrl. QR gradient stops [#260133,#1F2348] = nimiq-blue gradient. checkBlur() app-not-found detection is a reusable mobile pattern.

components.name: CheckoutCardBitcoin / CheckoutCardEthereum / CheckoutCardNimiqExternal
components.purpose: Script-only per-currency subclasses of CheckoutCardExternal that build the payment deep link (BIP21 / EIP681 / Nimiq URI via @nimiq/utils create*RequestLink) and supply currency-specific manual payment details (amount, fee, gas, payment reference).
components.notes: Three thin adapter files (~55 lines each); good reference for adding a currency to the checkout pattern. Icons referenced by filename ('icon-btc.svg'/'icon-eth.svg', NIM uses nimiq-logo CSS class).

components.name: LedgerUi
components.purpose: Ledger hardware-wallet instruction screen layered on StatusScreen: pure-CSS animated Ledger device illustration (cable plug-in, PIN dots, app/dashboard/confirm screens) driven by @nimiq/ledger-api state, with a Connect button for user-gesture WebUSB/WebHID connection.
components.cssDeps: nimiq-style nq-button-s inverse; massive scoped CSS (~500 lines) with own CSS vars (--ledger-container-width, --ledger-scale-factor, --ledger-opacity, --ledger-connect-animation-step-duration) and background-image device art; uses StatusScreen deep selectors
components.notes: 752 lines. Any Nimiq app adding Ledger support wants this, but it requires @nimiq/ledger-api and browser WebUSB/WebHID; instruction strings are i18n ($t). Singleton LedgerApi event listeners attached on created.

components.name: CashlinkSparkle
components.purpose: Decorative celebratory sparkle graphic (desktop 252x240 and mobile 375x84 SVG dot fields with blue/green/gold radial gradients) around a circular nimiq-blue CashlinkIcon badge.
components.cssDeps: nq-blue-bg class, var(--nimiq-blue), var(--nimiq-green); brand gradient hexes inline in SVG (#0582ca/#265dd7, #21bca5/#41a38e, #e9b213/#ec991c); scoped styles map cls-N classes to opacities
components.notes: Pure SVG/CSS, no script logic beyond the icon import. Nice brand confetti for success screens; gradient stops are the official Nimiq light-blue/green/gold gradients.

components.name: icons/LedgerIcon + icons/LoginFileIcon
components.purpose: Functional-template brand SVG icons: a Ledger Nano outline (currentColor, .7 opacity) and the Nimiq Login File (identicon hexagons + QR code, white fill).
components.cssDeps: None; LedgerIcon uses fill=currentColor (themeable), LoginFileIcon hardcodes fill #fff (dark backgrounds only)
components.notes: Zero-dependency functional components; copy-paste safe.

components.name: GlobalClose
components.purpose: Bottom 'Back to {appName}' cancel button shown under every hub request page, rejecting the RPC request (ERROR_CANCELED) or running a custom onClose.
components.cssDeps: nimiq-style nq-button-s, var(--nimiq-ease), var(--nimiq-light-blue); scoped, 450px mobile breakpoint repositions to top-right
components.notes: Hub-popup glue (RPC reject + hardcoded appName translation switch), though the ghost back-button styling pattern is borrowable.

components.name: Input
components.purpose: Eleven-line subclass of @nimiq/vue-components LabelInput that defaults maxBytes to the hub's LABEL_MAX_LENGTH constant.
components.notes: Use upstream LabelInput directly in a generic app.

components.name: Network
components.purpose: Renderless (empty template) Nimiq blockchain helper: builds/signs transaction objects, relays them with history-state retry storage, fetches balances, height, and genesis vesting contracts, and emits consensus events.
components.notes: Not a UI component at all — blockchain plumbing using global Nimiq namespace; out of scope for a branding/scaffolding CLI.

components.name: NotEnoughCookieSpace
components.purpose: Error card (StatusScreen in error state inside SmallPage) telling Safari users the cookie account storage is full, then rejecting the RPC request.
components.cssDeps: Inherits StatusScreen/SmallPage styling; no own styles
components.notes: Hub/Safari-specific glue; useful only as a minimal example of composing StatusScreen + SmallPage into an error page.

designTokens: The hub defines almost no tokens itself — everything comes from @nimiq/style and @nimiq/vue-components, both imported globally in hub/src/App.vue lines 21-22 (and hub/src/CashlinkApp.vue lines 25-26): '@nimiq/style/nimiq-style.min.css' + '@nimiq/vue-components/dist/NimiqVueComponents.css'. The @nimiq/style source is vendored as a sibling in this repo at upstream/nimiq-style/: src/theme.css defines the CSS custom properties (--nimiq-blue #1F2348, --nimiq-light-blue, --nimiq-green, --nimiq-orange, --nimiq-red, --nimiq-gold etc., their *-bg radial-gradient variants, *-darkened hover variants, --nimiq-ease easing, --nimiq-gray/--nimiq-card-bg/--nimiq-highlight-bg); src/typography.css sets the Muli font stack and nq-h1/nq-h2/nq-text type scale; src/buttons.css holds pill radii/shadows; src/icons.css + nimiq-style.icons.svg supply nq-icon sprites (e.g. nimiq-logo); built bundle at upstream/nimiq-style/nimiq-style.min.css. Component-level CSS (SmallPage card radius/shadow, PageHeader/PageBody/PageFooter layout, AccountSelector, PaymentInfoLine) lives in upstream/vue-components/. Hub-local additions: hub/src/App.vue <style> defines the global transition-fade and transition-flip helpers (used by the checkout card flip) and overrides .nq-button height to 6.5rem. Conventions: rem sizing against nimiq-style's 8px root font-size, cubic-bezier(0.25, 0, 0, 1) (= --nimiq-ease) everywhere, recurring hardcoded brand hexes #1F2348/#0582CA/#260133 in SVGs and rgba() derivations.
stack: Vue 2.6 + TypeScript class components (vue-property-decorator/vuex-class) + @nimiq/style + @nimiq/vue-components, scoped CSS per SFC

repo: nimiq-branding-cli/upstream (onmax/nimiq-ui modern nimiq-css monorepo + legacy nimiq/nimiq-style)
stack: CSS-first, no Vue components in these packages. Modern: nimiq-css with cascade @layers (nq-colors, nq-preflight, nq-typography, nq-spacing, nq-utilities, nq-animations, nq-atomic) + an optional UnoCSS preset (src/unocss/index.ts) + Iconify icon set (nimiq-icons). Legacy: plain hand-written CSS (@nimiq/style) with --nimiq-* CSS vars and an 8px root font-size rem system.
designTokens: MODERN (nimiq-ui/packages/nimiq-css): colors in src/css/colors.css (auto-generated :root vars, oklch + light-dark() dual-mode: --colors-neutral-0..1100, --colors-blue/green/orange/red/gold/purple + 400/500/600/1100 tints + radial-gradient from/to/darkened pairs); TS source of truth for the palette is src/colors.ts (light/dark tuples consumed by unocss-preset-light-dark). Easing/shadows/fonts/scrollbar vars in src/css/preflight.css (:root: --nq-ease cubic-bezier(0.25,0,0,1), --nq-shadow, --nq-shadow-lg, --nq-font-sans 'Mulish', --nq-font-mono 'Fira Code', --nq-track/--nq-thumb, fluid base font-size 16px via clamp between 320-1152px viewports). @font-face in src/css/fonts.css (Mulish variable 200-1000 + Fira Mono, expects /assets/fonts/). Fluid spacing scale in src/css/spacing.css (--f-mt/mb/pt/pb/pl/pr min/max clamp engine, classes nq-mt-12..nq-p-128). Radii are per-component constants (pill 999px, card 0.5rem, card-lg 0.625rem, input 0.125em). Animation durations 400ms in src/css/animations.css. LEGACY (nimiq-style): everything in src/theme.css (--nimiq-blue #1F2348, --nimiq-light-blue #0582CA, --nimiq-gold #E9B213, --nimiq-green #21BCA5, --nimiq-orange #FC8702, --nimiq-red #D94432, purple/pink/light-green/brown, *-darkened hover variants, *-bg radial-gradient(100% 100% at bottom right,...) pairs, --nimiq-highlight-bg, --nimiq-card-bg) + src/main.css (--nimiq-ease, --attr-duration .2s, --movement-duration .4s) + src/typography.css (html font-size: 8px, --nimiq-size, Muli font stack). Shadows hardcoded: 0 .5rem 1.5rem rgba(0,0,0,.15) (nq-shadow), card 0 .5rem 3.5rem rgba(0,0,0,.111).

components.name: nq-colors token layer
components.purpose: Auto-generated :root design-token sheet defining the entire modern Nimiq palette as oklch light-dark() CSS vars including gradient from/to/darkened pairs for every brand hue.
components.cssDeps: Self-contained; requires browser light-dark() support; dark mode flips automatically via color-scheme
components.notes: Auto-generated from src/colors.ts — edit the TS, not the CSS. Every other modern component reads these vars. Loaded into layer(nq-colors) by index.css.

components.name: nq-preflight
components.purpose: Base reset and global defaults: fluid base font-size engine (clamp 320-1152px), Mulish/Fira Code font stacks, heading/p/small/blockquote/code defaults, invisible 1rem touch hit-area around links/buttons on non-hover devices, --nq-ease/--nq-shadow tokens.
components.notes: Styles bare h1-h6/p/blockquote/code element selectors — opinionated; use .nq-raw to escape. Blockquotes get green callout treatment by default.

components.name: nq-pill (button family)
components.purpose: The modern Nimiq button/badge: pill-shaped with radial brand gradient that animates between normal and darkened states via registered @property custom properties.
components.cssDeps: --colors-{hue}-gradient-from/to + darkened variants, --nq-ease; uses @property --nq-gradient-from/to (Chromium-grade CSS needed for gradient transition)
components.notes: Gradient hover animation degrades gracefully without @property support. -secondary has dark-context overrides for .dark/.bg-darkblue/.bg-neutral parents.

components.name: nq-ghost-btn
components.purpose: Small low-emphasis text button (6x8px padding, 12px text) with neutral hover background, for toolbars and inline actions.

components.name: nq-close-btn
components.purpose: Circular 1em close button with embedded base64 SVG cross rendered via CSS mask, sized by font-size.
components.cssDeps: --colors-neutral-0/500/600, --colors-blue focus ring; data-URI mask, no external asset
components.notes: Cross icon is inline base64 — no icon dependency.

components.name: nq-switch
components.purpose: Pure-CSS toggle switch styling for input[type=checkbox] (appearance:none, sliding white knob, blue when checked).
components.notes: No JS needed; it is the native checkbox restyled.

components.name: nq-input-box
components.purpose: Modern text input/textarea style with outline border, blue hover/focus tinting, orange invalid state (.nq-invalid or :user-invalid), and auto-growing textarea via field-sizing:content (3-5 lines).
props: works on input, textarea, or wrapper :has(textarea)
components.cssDeps: --colors-neutral/blue/orange via color-mix, --nq-ease; field-sizing is Chromium-only (degrades to fixed)
components.notes: Valid+focused turns the outline solid blue — a subtle validity affordance.

components.name: nq-card
components.purpose: Basic content card: neutral-50 background, 0.5rem radius, 1.5px inset color-mix outline, flex column, 1.5rem padding.

components.name: nq-card-lg
components.purpose: Large dialog/hub card (max-width 37.5rem) with semantic header/section/footer child styling, shadow + outline, responsive padding — the modern successor of the Hub card.
props: header+section / section+footer spacing collapse built in
components.cssDeps: --colors-neutral-0, --nq-shadow, color-mix outline; expects .nq-notice inside header (legacy class)
components.notes: Uses semantic elements not classes for inner structure — markup shape matters.

components.name: nq-hoverable (card family)
components.purpose: Interactive marketing card with radial gradient background that lifts (-0.375rem translateY), whitens, and gains shadow on hover; color variants invert to darkened brand gradients with white text.
props: addon: .nq-hoverable-cta child reveals 'Learn more' (override text via --nq-content) on parent hover
components.notes: Used heavily on nimiq.com grid sections; nq-hoverable-cta uses --nq-content custom property for the label.

components.name: nq-arrow / nq-arrow-back
components.purpose: Link affordance that appends (or prepends) a masked arrow glyph which auto-rotates for external http links (45deg) vs internal links (right-pointing) and nudges on hover.
props: detects a[href^=http] on self or ancestor for external rotation
components.cssDeps: Inline base64 SVG mask, no token deps beyond currentColor
components.notes: Pure CSS external-link detection via attribute selectors — clever but means non-anchor usage defaults to internal style.

components.name: nq-label
components.purpose: Uppercase tracked-out (0.17em) bold section label in neutral-800 with dark/inverted overrides.
components.notes: Same class name exists in legacy nimiq-style with different metrics.

components.name: nq-subline
components.purpose: Hero subtitle text style (1.375rem mobile / 1.5rem desktop, neutral-800, 2.75rem bottom margin).

components.name: nq-prose typography
components.purpose: Article/markdown typography system (.nq-prose / .nq-prose-compact): fluid em/lh-based font sizes and margins for h1-h6, p, lists with custom counters/bullets, green blockquote callouts, tables with sticky headers, kbd, details/summary accordions, and hover # anchor links on headings.
props: root font-size on .nq-prose scales everything proportionally
components.cssDeps: --colors-* tokens, --nq-font-sans/mono, --nq-ease; heavy use of 1lh units and :where chains; inline base64 chevron for summary
components.notes: Equivalent of Tailwind prose for Nimiq docs/blog. Non-compact variant adds 6-8rem trailing padding to last child — surprising outside full-page articles.

components.name: static-content sections
components.purpose: Landing-page layout layer for nimiq.com-style sites: every <section>/[data-section] becomes a centered flex column with fluid 160-200px vertical padding that auto-collapses to 36-48px between same-background neighbors, plus large fluid h1-h4 display scales (44-64px) and .nq-wide full-bleed modifier.
components.cssDeps: --colors-* tokens; bg-darkblue sections flip color-scheme:dark; NOT imported by index.css — import layer(nq-static-content) manually
components.notes: Opt-in layer; adjacent-section padding logic relies on :has() chains. This is the secret sauce of nimiq.com page rhythm.

components.name: fluid spacing utilities
components.purpose: Generated utility classes (nq-mt-12 ... nq-p-128) that set fluid margin/padding via clamp() interpolating between min/max px across 320-1440px viewports.
components.cssDeps: Self-contained clamp engine on *; pairs with unocss-preset-fluid-sizing for Uno users
components.notes: Classes only set the --f-*-min/max vars; the * rule computes/applies — so they don't compose with non-nq margin utilities.

components.name: atomic helpers
components.purpose: Small set of plain atomic classes for non-UnoCSS consumers: text-{hue}, bg-neutral-{50..1100}, bg-{hue}, flex-grow variants, margin-top-1..5, nq-shadow/nq-shadow-lg, hidden/display-none.
components.cssDeps: --colors-* tokens; note .nq-shadow here references --colors-shadow (token name mismatch with preflight's --nq-shadow — verify before relying on it)
components.notes: Redundant if the app uses Tailwind/UnoCSS; intended for raw-CSS consumers.

components.name: animation classes
components.purpose: Keyframes (spin, shake, fade, move-left/right, shrink, grow, from-left/right/bottom) plus paired *-in/*-out classes at 400ms for view transitions, identical in spirit to the legacy set.
components.cssDeps: Self-contained; classes set animation-name/duration only — element needs animation trigger (mount/class swap)
components.notes: Bug upstream: .from-right-in maps to from-bottom keyframes.

components.name: nq-curtain-y
components.purpose: Scroll container that fades its top/bottom edges with an animated gradient mask driven by scroll-timeline (mask appears only when content overflows in that direction).
props: requires top-0 or bottom-0 positioning per inline comment
components.cssDeps: CSS scroll-timeline + animation-timeline:scroll(self) + mask-composite — Chromium-only today
components.notes: Progressive enhancement only; no fallback fade in unsupported browsers.

components.name: nq-scrollbar / nq-scrollbar-sm / nq-hide-scrollbar
components.purpose: Custom webkit scrollbar theming (rounded thumb using --nq-thumb/--nq-track tokens, responsive widths) and a cross-browser scrollbar hider.
components.cssDeps: --nq-track/--nq-thumb from preflight; ::-webkit-scrollbar only (Firefox gets scrollbar-width:none path for hide variant only)
components.notes: Typo upstream: '-thum' selectors in the sm variants are dead rules.

components.name: nq-focusable
components.purpose: One-liner focus-visible ring utility (2px blue outline, 3px offset) matching the ring used across all nq components.

components.name: fonts (@font-face)
components.purpose: @font-face declarations for Mulish variable (200-1000 weight) and Fira Mono, expected at /assets/fonts/.
props: font files NOT bundled — app must serve /assets/fonts/Mulish-VariableFont_wght.ttf etc.
components.cssDeps: None; preflight font stacks fall back to system fonts if missing
components.notes: Mulish src says format('woff2') but points at a .ttf — copy fonts and fix format when scaffolding. Not imported by index.css.

components.name: UnoCSS Nimiq preset
components.purpose: definePreset wrapper that exposes every CSS layer as toggleable preflights/rules for UnoCSS, wires the light-dark color palette (unocss-preset-light-dark), local Mulish/Fira Code web fonts, attributify utilities, and i-nimiq:* icons.
components.cssDeps: Generates the same CSS as the static files; deps: unocss, unocss-preset-light-dark, @unocss/preset-web-fonts, ts-cssjson
components.notes: Build-time only (reads CSS files from disk via node:fs); the path for Vite/Uno apps, while css/index.css is the path for plain-CSS apps.

components.name: nimiq-icons (Iconify set)
components.purpose: 323 brand icons (plus flags set in src/flags/) exported as an Iconify JSON collection, consumed as i-nimiq:<name> via UnoCSS/Iconify, auto-synced from Figma by scripts/.
props: also ships index.js/mjs/d.ts for programmatic access
components.cssDeps: Rendered as mask/background by Iconify tooling; currentColor-driven
components.notes: Builder needs a Figma token to regenerate; the committed JSON is the usable artifact for scaffolding.

components.name: nimiq-css legacy compat layer
components.purpose: Verbatim port of the old @nimiq/style framework (buttons, inputs, layout, theme, typography, dark-adaptions, icons) bundled inside nimiq-css so apps can migrate incrementally; MIGRATION.md documents the class mapping.
props: same classes as legacy nimiq-style below
components.cssDeps: --nimiq-* vars (own theme.css), independent of the new --colors-* tokens
components.notes: Read MIGRATION.md for old-to-new mapping (nq-button to nq-pill-xl, nq-card to nq-card-lg, etc.).

components.name: nimiq-theme (VS Code theme)
components.purpose: 'Nimiq Dark' code editor color theme (TextMate/semantic token colors), not a web UI artifact.
components.notes: Useful only for docs code-block highlighting or an editor extension; skip for app scaffolding.

components.name: nq-button (legacy)
components.purpose: The classic large Nimiq CTA button: 7.5rem-tall uppercase pill with radial brand gradient, layered ::before darkened-gradient hover crossfade, lift/press transforms, and ::after focus ring.
components.notes: Gradient hover done with an opacity-crossfaded ::before (pre-@property technique). All rem values assume html{font-size:8px}.

components.name: nq-button-s / nq-button-pill (legacy)
components.purpose: Small secondary button (translucent blue-tinted bg, colored text) and its filled gradient pill sibling, with the same color variants and an invisible 1.5rem extended hit area.
components.cssDeps: --nimiq-* colors/gradients, hardcoded rgba tints per hue, --nimiq-ease

components.name: nq-input / nq-input-s (legacy)
components.purpose: Legacy text inputs drawn with an inset box-shadow border (2px/1.5px) that tints light-blue on hover/focus, with a .vanishing borderless variant.
components.cssDeps: --nimiq-blue, --nimiq-light-blue, hardcoded rgba placeholder colors; background-clip:padding-box iOS fix
components.notes: File is mostly commented-out dead code (old range slider/password styles) — only the top ~55 lines are live.

components.name: nq-card + header/body/footer (legacy)
components.purpose: The Keyguard/Hub white sheet card (max-width 75rem, 1.25rem radius, big soft shadow) with .nq-card-header (centered 4rem pad), .nq-card-body, .nq-card-footer and adjacency padding collapses.
components.notes: This is the pixel reference for every Nimiq wallet/keyguard screen card.

components.name: legacy typography (nq-h1/h2/h3, nq-text, nq-notice, nq-link, nq-list)
components.purpose: Type scale on the 8px-rem system: headings (24/20/16px bold), .nq-text body (16px, 70% blue), .nq-text-s, .nq-label (uppercase 0.107em tracking), .nq-notice with .info/.success/.warning/.error colorways, .nq-link, .nq-list, plus a .nq-style wrapper that styles bare h1/p/a/ul.
props: wrapper mode: .nq-style on a container styles plain markup
components.cssDeps: --nimiq-* colors, Muli font + html{font-size:8px} root — the framework's load-bearing gotcha
components.notes: .nq-notice.error/.warning are the de-facto feedback messaging components of old Nimiq apps.

components.name: legacy theme tokens + color utilities
components.purpose: Defines all --nimiq-* color vars, darkened hover variants, and the signature bottom-right radial background gradients, plus .nq-{color} text utilities (!important) and .nq-{color}-bg gradient background classes.
components.notes: The hex values here (#1F2348, #0582CA, #21BCA5, #FC8702, #D94432, #E9B213) are the canonical legacy brand palette — the CLI's pixel-accuracy source for older-style apps.

components.name: legacy dark adaptions
components.purpose: Context overrides making components legible on colored/gradient backgrounds: inside .nq-{color}-bg, links/text go white/70%-white, --nimiq-light-blue and --nimiq-red swap to on-dark variants, and inputs switch to white-alpha borders.
props: activated by parent .nq-blue-bg etc.; .nq-card inside resets to light palette
components.notes: Class-context based, not media-query based — the legacy 'dark mode' is per-surface.

components.name: legacy icon sprite (.nq-icon)
components.purpose: SVG symbol sprite of ~39 wallet-centric icons (cashlink, qr-code, scan-qr-code, ledger, keys, login, transfer, checkmark, alerts, view/view-off...) used via <svg class=nq-icon><use xlink:href=...#nq-{name}/></svg>; icons.css just sizes .nq-icon to 1em square.
components.notes: Individual SVG sources in nimiq-style/src/icons/ with _FORMAT.md conventions. Payment/wallet glyphs absent from generic sets live here.

components.name: legacy animations
components.purpose: Optional keyframe set (shake, fade, move, shrink/grow, from-left/right/bottom) predating and matching the modern animations layer.
components.notes: Commented out of main.css by default — opt-in import.

components.name: legacy layout utilities
components.purpose: Misc utilities batch: .flex-grow/.flex-grow-half/.flex-grow-double, .hidden, .display-none, .margin-top-1..5 (rem steps), .nq-shadow/.nq-shadow-l.
components.notes: App-era glue; superseded by the modern atomic.css equivalents.

components.name: nimiq-style.min.css (built bundle)
components.purpose: The single-file production build of the entire legacy framework (v0.8.5) that downstream apps actually link; demo.html in the same dir renders every component as a live styleguide.
components.notes: For pixel-accurate scaffolding of legacy-style apps, ship this file verbatim; demo.html is the visual regression reference.
